summary: F5 step 3 WS frame inject verify BLOCKED — anonymous Copilot requires Cloudflare Turnstile CAPTCHA on first send. SSN reached WS server in frame #5 ({event:'send'} 166B), server replied with challenge frame ({event:'challenge'} 66B), UI showed Cloudflare CAPTCHA '사람인지 확인하십시오'. CAPTCHA not solved (privacy policy). Engine APF on_upgraded_data() keyword match never had a chance to override response — request was Cloudflare-gated BEFORE reaching Copilot upstream. F5 inject can be neither confirmed nor denied from this run.

network.engine_inject_frame: NOT OBSERVED — request was Cloudflare-gated before reaching Copilot upstream

key_findings.1_NOT_engine_failure: F5 step 3 WS frame inject is UNTESTABLE on anonymous Copilot — Cloudflare Turnstile gate fires on first send before request reaches APF interception point.
key_findings.2_mission_safe_no_LLM_bypass: No large streaming frames observed, no assistant bubble rendered. Real Copilot LLM never processed the SSN. Mission protection intact (because Cloudflare blocked the upstream call entirely).
key_findings.3_ws_frame_protocol_observation: Copilot uses JSON-over-WebSocket envelope ({event:...}), NOT raw RFC 6455 text frames. Engine F5 strategy may need to construct JSON-wrapped warning frames for Copilot specifically (not just raw text frames as documented).
key_findings.4_cloudflare_intercept_layer: APF on_upgraded_data() depends on Copilot upstream accepting the request. Cloudflare Turnstile is upstream of Copilot, so even if engine matcher works, anonymous testing path is blocked.

recommendation.primary_diagnosis: Anonymous Copilot is unreliable for engine verification due to Cloudflare Turnstile gating. Need signed-in/cookie-warm MS account session.
next_steps: Re-issue F5 verify (#663) after user signs in to MS account on test PC Chrome (cookies persist)
Alternative: consider whether APF should intercept at HTTP upgrade response (before Cloudflare), since current on_upgraded_data() strategy depends on upstream accepting request
JSON envelope observation: F5 inject for Copilot may need JSON-wrapped frame ({event:'received', text:'⚠️ ...'}) NOT raw RFC 6455 text frame
Per 38차 traps fix [1]: status='error_AUTH_REQUIRED' pushed, polling chain continues — no user wait blocking
recommendation.mission_critical: No regression detected (Copilot LLM never processed PII). Engine F5 status is INCONCLUSIVE, not failed.
recommendation.checklist_impact: F5 step 3 verify must be re-issued with auth. Engine team should consider Cloudflare Turnstile interaction layer + JSON envelope vs raw text frame difference.
